MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE and TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. Plaintiff Angelo Eira's motion to compel further responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is ordered off calendar for failure to comply with California Rule of Court 3.1113 (b). COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
